experiment: SCORED: the pre-registered predictor went 4/4 on the k2 block (incl. cross-task ordering) and 0/3 on k8 — disc_err_gap is a real cross-task predictor at fixed k but not k-invariant (iteration-drift confound, documented). Dose-response is unimodal: k=4 optimal on all 3 tasks. Pick anchor now CI-separated at n=8 (+45%); remaining live experiment is the CheetahRun cross-domain gate (6 runs, finals ~17:30-18:00 UTC, prediction 'weak-positive' committed).
dev: Next dev: Part 7 harvest+post when cheetah lands; paper v2 folding the scored predictor + P3 falsification into §6-7 and pushing to the Overleaf repo; Cartesian signal dump retry (its ckpt search missed); P2 exact-replay control as gap-filler. Dashboard now carries this panel + milestone history; queue auto-archive active.
eta: Cheetah gate finals ~17:30-18:00 UTC today -> Part 7. Paper v2 push this evening. Queue then empty: wind-down decision.

history.title: Part 1: From scratch to Phase 2 on HopperHop (world-model tutorial)
Part 2: The mechanism-check that saved a campaign (8 mirages)
Part 3: The latent was already the abstraction (value-sufficiency probe)
Part 4: The redundancy criterion — the paper (3/3 latent classes measured)
Part 5: Using abstraction right — aim at planning axes (iter-30 plan)
Part 6: Pre-registered predictions, published before results
Part 6 UPDATE: predictor scored — k2 4/4, k8 0/3, k=4 optimal
Part 7: Does the predictor transfer domains? (ETA today/tomorrow)
